mapper.select: SELECT album_id, album_name FROM ALBUM WHERE del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, album_id DESC
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order), 0) + 1 FROM ALBUM WHERE del_yn = 'N'
SELECT album_id, album_name FROM ALBUM WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND album_name = #{albumName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ALBUM ( album_id, album_name, created_at, sort_order, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{albumId}, #{albumName}, NOW(), #{sortOrder}, 'N' )
